cases.setup: Stable Application uses one immutable Revision and exact target Compatibility before Installation.
Executable path or package ID becomes canonical Application identity.
Provider acknowledges install, then exact installed Revision/files/configuration are read back.
Backend exit code marks installation verified without read-back.
Transient install failure retries with same logical Operation and a new Attempt/nonce.
Installation retry reuses previous Attempt identity.
Headless Application Session is running without a Window or Display.
Visible Window alone marks Application Session ready.
Display Session fails while headless Application Session continues.
Application Session continues silently after Provider restart using old Process/Window context.
Application Session survives Window recreation with a new Window identity/generation.
Application checkpoint component references WP05 Checkpoint Bundle and exact Session/Process/window state.
Hash-verified checkpoint is treated as functional recovery.
Restore creates new Process/Window/Display generation and verifies required functional postconditions.
Application files and Process restore but one service/data function remains unavailable.
Pixels stream after restore but application function is unverified.
Old backend window handle is used after recreation/Provider generation change.
Uninstall verifies application state and required remnants absent.
Uninstall command success is treated as verified absence.
Native/VM/container application Provider changes.
Browser Binary role references immutable exact Binary Revision.
OS PID or CDP endpoint becomes canonical Browser Process identity.
Persistent Profile identity/revision survives Browser Process restart.
Mutually untrusted Workspaces concurrently write one Profile.
Multiple Contexts read one verified Profile Revision with writes disabled.
Context writes after Profile Lease/fence expires.
Context binds explicit profile/storage/network/permission policy and generation.
One backend flag is treated as complete ephemeral/privacy proof.
Page contains same-origin and cross-origin Frames with separate identities.
CDP/WebDriver target ID becomes canonical Page identity.
Popup links opener Page and new Page while preserving both identities.
Popup overwrites opener Page identity.
Same Page records multiple immutable Navigation revisions including same-document change.
URL string replaces Page/Navigation identity.
MFA/captcha/consent Challenge pauses only affected Page while Process/other Pages remain active.
Credentials/MFA secret is copied into public evidence to resolve Challenge.
Control transfers to human, automation is fenced, and fresh evidence proves Challenge resolved.
One Page challenge marks entire Browser Process failed.
Browser Download initiates WP06 Transfer; digest, Content/Object and Location verify before completion.
Browser event alone marks download completed_verified.
Download resumes with exact validators and new Transfer Attempt.
Temporary download path becomes Object identity.
DOM says button enabled while pixels/accessibility indicate disabled/covered.
Screenshot alone proves DOM/network/application state.
Profile/navigation checkpoint restores into new Process/Context/Page generations.
Cookie presence after restore proves authenticated session.
Browser Provider/warm pool changes while stable Binary/Profile identity and evidence history remain.
Semantic Context binds exact Application/Browser/Device surface and Provider generation.
Backend element handle becomes durable Target identity.
Immutable Snapshot and Node Snapshots retain role/name/state/relation/geometry under one generation.
Opaque cross-origin/custom canvas region makes Snapshot partial.
Partial tree is labelled complete.
Semantic Event invalidates current Snapshot/Target Result after tree/focus/navigation change.
Action uses Target Result from old Snapshot/context/provider generation.
Selector matches two enabled Submit buttons while policy requires unique.
Multiple matches are ranked and policy explicitly permits ranked multiple selection with evidence.
Ambiguous selector silently chooses first backend match.
Action Attempt binds fresh Target Result, current Lease/fence, Provider generation and new WP02 Attempt.
Automation mutates UI without current runtime.lease/fence.
Action retry reuses prior WP02 Attempt/nonce.
Provider acknowledges click; fresh Snapshot/API/visual evidence verifies intended postcondition.
Provider click response alone produces completed_verified.
Semantic method unavailable; policy-approved keyboard fallback is used and assurance is lowered.
Automation silently falls back to screen coordinates.
Disconnect after input makes effect uncertain; fresh state is reacquired before deciding retry.
Action automatically retries after uncertain effect.
Before/after target-region evidence is redacted under privacy policy.
Password/clipboard/private semantic value appears in public evidence.
Shell Client attaches to Workspace with immutable Layout Revision and current Projections.
Mobile client disconnect automatically stops Application/Browser/Transfer work.
Panel binds to exact runtime/source entities under observe/control permissions.
Panel closed/hidden is treated as Process/Activity stopped.
Desktop Layout Revision is immutable and placements reference Panels.
Phone viewport derives single-primary switcher projection from desktop Layout Revision.
Opening phone client rewrites canonical desktop Layout Revision.
Client Observation causes reduced video/update frequency while runtime continues.
Command is issued from stale Projection/source revision without refresh.
Control Transfer quiesces automation, revokes old fence, issues human Lease/fence.
Human and automation can both mutate under valid-looking stale fences.
Human completes challenge then transfers control back with return conditions and fresh automation fence.
Control transfers while old holder has unresolved input/effects.
All primary Shell/Panel operations are reachable by keyboard with semantic labels/focus order.
Critical panel action is touch-only without semantic/keyboard equivalent.
Large text and narrow viewport reflow without hiding critical controls.
Activity/health status is conveyed only by color.
RTL/localized labels preserve logical order, commands and evidence references.
Private profile/clipboard/screenshot cache is exported publicly.
Playwright/CDP backend is replaced by another Browser Provider.
Application runtime moves from local native to VM/remote Provider.
Accessibility semantic Provider is replaced by DOM/platform adapter.
Shell UI framework changes while Panel Types, Layout Revisions and runtime truth remain stable.
Stale/ambiguous/challenged/failed records are deleted to present success.
